{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320115322D8CCA5C8801163993125"}"},"total":3},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7603257227939906366","common":{"comment_type":31,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这是挑读者的作品啊  信息密度太高了  前两章堆的设定都能填海了  很多设定都不明写  主角前世也是一点不带写的  
但质量没得说  特别喜欢里面的几句话啊

1.善意在此世  是奢侈品  更是危险的幻觉  他无法量化  无法存储  随时可能因为利益  恐惧或简单的遗忘而变质

2.规则是强者给弱者设置的囚笼  也是强者为自身行为准备的免责声明

3.变了么？  不过是撕去了无用的伪装  显露出这世界本就该有的  生存竞争的真实面目

4.光明永远只是点缀  黑暗才是底色

可以说  韩小雨的死  是这部作品黑暗的升华点"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1770273759,"group_id":"7595880395225189401","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3581554061744371"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7595880395225189401","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"92"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":5224,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":7870,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7602211528926184254","common":{"comment_type":-90,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"章节断层了  中间少了两个章节  莫不是把第一第二章节修改为公告和声明了？楼上说什么删减版的，看了一点  发现断层前章节确实是比断层后的章节要更黑暗的。断层后的内容反而在刻意收敛。没有什么冲击力。
楼上那位说ai味太浓了，我也听了十几章了，倒是没听出什么味道来，反而这本小说的主角倒像是个生存ai。没有多余的抒情，对我而言，是相对压抑的。
而且这本小说的文笔绝对不是一个小白能驾驭的，多半是哪个大神开小号写的，ai能生成这种质量高，不避讳，剧情无断层的内容。我是一百有九十个不相信的。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1770030143,"group_id":"7595880395225189401","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyNny7WoC6EbFWAnS5ccgzVXsvshEaTKIYSevEtEMfvq","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3581554061744371","user_name":"喜欢爱英的金锋昂"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3581554061744371","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7595880395225189401","book_info":{"abstract":"【-非无脑-非爽文-无打脸-无系统-无女主-无套路-杀伐果断-利益至上-绝对理性-永生-】
